description: One-line description of what this workflow does (≤ 160 chars)
detailedDescription: Detailed markdown description of what this workflow does, what APIs it calls, and what the outputs mean.

inputs.name: walletAddress
inputs.description: EVM wallet address to check the health factor for

inputs.name: protocol
inputs.description: 'aave' or 'compound' — which lending protocol to query

outputs.name: healthFactor
outputs.description: Ratio of collateral to debt. ≥ 1.0 means the position is solvent.
